description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with multiple rooftop terraces, including a glass-enclosed sunroom and green spaces. The structure is primarily composed of clean, geometric lines and large glass windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered driveway with two parked cars and is flanked by palm trees, giving a luxurious urban feel. On one side, a spacious swimming pool and outdoor lounge area are visible, while the other side includes a landscaped driveway and additional greenery. The rear of the bungalow showcases more rooftop gardens and open terraces, emphasizing outdoor living. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, metal, and wood, with a strong emphasis on modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with rooftop terraces, large glass windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped driveways, featuring clean lines and contemporary materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered driveway with two cars, and palm trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked cars, palm trees, and the swimming pool area on the opposite side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying rooftop terraces, glass sunroom, swimming pool, and outdoor lounge spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, rooftop gardens, and the pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
